zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret verch Gruffudd於大約1105年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾特雷費格爾斯時，她的父親King Gruffydd of Gwynedd51歲，母親Angharad ferch Owain41歲。她和Ieuaf ap Owain Lord of Arwystli至少有1個兒子。她去世於1165年享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret verch Gruffudd was born about 1105, in Trefeglwys, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, King Gruffydd of Gwynedd, was 51 and her mother, Angharad ferch Owain, was 41. She had at least 1 son with Ieuaf ap Owain Lord of Arwystli. She died in 1165, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret verch Gruffudd est née environ 1105, à Trefeglwys, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, King Gruffydd of Gwynedd, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Owain, avait 41 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Ieuaf ap Owain Lord of Arwystli. Elle est décédée en 1165, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret verch Gruffudd um 1105 in Trefeglwys, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Gruffydd of Gwynedd 51 und ihre Mutter Angharad ferch Owain 41. Sie hatte mit Ieuaf ap Owain Lord of Arwystli mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1165 im Alter von 61 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret verch Gruffudd è nata il circa 1105 nel Trefeglwys, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, King Gruffydd of Gwynedd, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Angharad ferch Owain, aveva 41 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Ieuaf ap Owain Lord of Arwystli. Morì nel 1165, all'età di 61 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret verch Gruffudd(이)가 대략 1105년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 트레페그w이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Gruffydd of Gwynedd(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Angharad ferch Owain(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 Ieuaf ap Owain Lord of Arwystli(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1165년 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret verch Gruffudd родилась около 1105 г. в местности трефеглвис, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени King Gruffydd of Gwynedd было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Owain, 41. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Ieuaf ap Owain Lord of Arwystli. Она умерла в 1165 г. в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret verch Gruffudd nació aproximadamente 1105, en Trefeglwys, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, King Gruffydd of Gwynedd, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Angharad ferch Owain, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Ieuaf ap Owain Lord of Arwystli. Murió en 1165, a la edad de 61 años.
